extra.reason: Stage 1 feature-complete: model evolution (Use sum + ClauseSlotUse), parser change (mineClauseSlotParameter for SKIP+LIMIT bare $p), TCK corpus widening (return-skip-limit/ + 18-entry skiplist + TestSkiplistOrphans), Layer-2 rule update (directional rule + AUTHORED pin for non-bare $p in SKIP/LIMIT), documentation bundle (Stage 1 spec + CONTEXT.md Use entry + Stage 0 §4 C2 note). All five cycles approved by both gated-swarm reviewers (Linus + Metz). just test green at 509/315/0/194.

Stage 2 complete: nullable bindings, listener accepts OPTIONAL MATCH, Layer-2 + goldens updated. Spec doc at docs/specs/cypher-query-parser-stage-2.md. Stack: stage-2-prep → stage-2-model → stage-2-unlock → stage-2-docs. just test green, godog 329/0/180.

Stage 3 landed on branch stage-3-projections. Model commit f053af8 (Projection sealed sum + AggregateFunc + Query.ReturnsAll, Linus gate PASS, pure refactor). Unlock commit (this): listener classifies var/var.prop/scalar-literal/func/aggregate + count(*) + RETURN *->ReturnsAll; 3 skiplist entries (NoVariablesInScope/UnknownFunction/ColumnNameConflict); +2 mustParse, -1 return-star mustReject, +1 authored residual; errors docstring trimmed; 10 new goldens; CONTEXT.md Projection/Aggregate + ADR 0003 note. TDD red->green, Linus gate PASS. godog 329/180 -> 336/173 (+7 passed, -7 pending). just test green. Follow-ups filed: gqlc-gyw (resolver grouping), gqlc-zir (unary-minus nit).

Stage 4 done: WITH chaining + UNION. Restructured query.Query into Branches(UNION)->Parts(WITH) with UnionKind enum; per-part scope threading (exported names L-to-R, WITH * transitive, cross-branch isolation); parameters stay query-wide. godog read-core 371 passed / 179 pending (was 336/173 at Stage 3 end; +35 scenarios parse, clauses/with+clauses/union added to readCoreDirs). 7 WITH/UNION negatives skiplisted (all verified below the type-interface boundary by adversarial review). Linus gate APPROVED. Commits 4491fb8(model)+b6cd944(unlock)+5821e4c(prep) pushed to origin/stage-4-with-union. NO PR per loop discipline.

Stage 5 complete: undirected relationship patterns (a)-[r]-(b) and (a)<-[r]->(b) now parse. EdgeBinding gains a positive 'directed' marker (field+Directed() accessor+trailing constructor param+always-emitted JSON key); listener uses an inverted zero-value-safe 'undirected' raw field, polarity flip at toBinding. collectEdge stops rejecting left==right; directed edges canonicalise, undirected keep textual order (no flip; <--> guarded). godog read-core 371/179 -> 380/170 (+9 passed). Linus gate APPROVED. Branch stage-5-undirected pushed to origin (commits dae7fb3 prep, b474fbe model, d4fbedd unlock). Not N/A: parser is schema-agnostic, marker is load-bearing (undirected yields no single EdgeKey, resolver forms two candidate keys).
Module path renamed to github.com/areqag/gqlc; PR #31 opened, thermo-nuclear review passed, just test green
PR opened: golangci config + fixes, CI workflows, hooks, branch protection. Closes via merge.
actionlint always-run required job in ci.yml; govulncheck required via single conditional workflow (in-job dep-diff, not the twin pattern)
PR #35 merged; GH #22 auto-closed
PR #36 merged: unary-signed operands now residual via GetChildCount guard in nonArithmeticFromAddSub

Stage 8 landed: PR #58 squash-merged as 53d20ea, GH issue #48 auto-closed. Adversarial review round 2 PASS (round 1 caught B1 synthetic-name collision — fixed via PathMember tagged sum). Suite 2517/2068/449/0, pins 52/6.

Stage 9 landed: PR #60 squash-merged as 9c39a50, GH issue #46 auto-closed. Two review rounds: round-1 caught B1 UnwindBinding collision matrix holes + B2 unconditional pattern-reuse skip; fixed via symmetric kind-conflict checks + elemType gate. Suite 2886/2468/418/0, pins 59/12.

Stage 10 aggregations merged as PR #62 (2e9f427), GH #45 closed. Round-1 review PASS (first of run); docs-only fix round (SF-1..4: skiplist comment, spec wire-truth amendments §1.2/§1.4/§8). Suite 2886/2468/418/0 → 2921/2496/425/0; pins 66 mustParse / 12 mustReject; sentinels 4. Follow-ups filed: gqlc-33k.1 (aggregate-kind preservation), gqlc-33k.2 (projection-list DISTINCT).
Merged via PR #63 (docs-contributing-md -> master), squash commit 8352903

Stage 11 merged: PR #65 (45045fe), GH #44 closed. Quantifiers ALL/ANY/NONE/SINGLE + EXISTS{} subqueries, TypeBool. Two review rounds (round-1 FAIL: mineComparisons descent leak → guard fix cffa32e + 4 red pins). Counts: suite 3535/3099/436/0; pins 75/13; sentinels 5. Follow-up gqlc-33k.3 filed (EXISTS LIMIT/SKIP param imprecision).
Folded into Stage 11 (PR #65): fifth sentinel ErrPatternInProjection at collectReturnItem, covers RETURN+WITH via shared oC_ProjectionBody; Pattern1 [22]/[23] skiplist entries removed.

Merged as PR #67 (0971f42), GH #43 closed. StatementKind axis + Part.Effects (7 variants), 6th sentinel ErrNestedPropertyTarget, SF3 write-golden harness. Suite 3740/3307/433/0, goldens 3061, pins 88/15. Follow-ups filed: gqlc-33k.3, gqlc-33k.4, gqlc-mpn.
Closed

Stage 15 landed: PR #73 squash-merged as 4848c234, GH #51 closed. Corpus complete: 3897 scenarios (3459 passed, 438 pending), 16006 steps, 3199 goldens, 89-entry typed skiplist across 8 categories with TestSkiplistCategoryPolicy guard. Thermo-nuclear review: 1 blocker (regex enumeration) fixed in fafdd3f, delta re-review PASS.

Landed in PR #76 (squash-merged; GH #75 auto-closed). Part gains exported Distinct bool axis (always-emit JSON "distinct"), NewPart grows to 5 args; parser reads oC_ProjectionBody DISTINCT in collectProjection, threaded via rawPart/buildPart; EXISTS-subquery suppression covers the axis via existing subqueryDepth gate. ErrEmptyPart invariant deliberately excludes Distinct. 3199 goldens rebaselined (+4711/-0, all lines the new distinct key); godog 3897/3459/438/0 unchanged; guard quartet + lint green. Linus PASS zero blockers, 3 mutants killed; spec docs/specs/cypher-query-parser-part-distinct-axis.md.

Freeze landed: PR #81 merged as 6bdb86c (closes GH #15). ADR 0008 declares query.Query frozen, inventories the frozen shape (sums: Binding x5, PathMember x4, Endpoint x2, Projection x5, Type x17, Use x3, Effect x8, SetEffect x3 + all axes), pins the resolver API (internal/resolver; resolver.New(schema, opts...) + WithRegistry(procsig.Registry); pure Resolve(query.Query) -> (ValidatedQuery, error)) discharging ADR 0006's deferral, and defines the additive-only revision protocol + apidiff gate. ADR 0003 header flipped to frozen note; CONTEXT.md Resolver/Validated-query entries updated. Linus adversarial review: round 1 FAIL (sentinel-retirement overreach, fixed in 79c50b0) -> round 2 PASS zero blockers, all claims verified first-party incl. godog baseline 3897/3459/438/0.

Epic complete: all pre-freeze scope delivered. Stages 6-14 (gqlc-97z, 9b4, 9nl, ydk, 2av, 665, mkv, cqh, im1) + scope ADR gqlc-39s + TCK sweep gqlc-x6u + pre-freeze fixes gqlc-33k.1/.2 + gqlc-3r0 all closed; freeze gqlc-cta landed as PR #81 (6bdb86c, ADR 0008). Remaining open children re-homed: 33k.3/.4 -> gqlc-0mx (post-freeze, consumer-driven); gqlc-c5f re-scoped standalone (premise corrected: Neo4j dialect extension, not a grammar bug); gqlc-7ur detached (standalone P3 polish).

Stale umbrella, substance delivered: Stages 1-5 (read core) closed under it long ago; the expanded surface (Stages 6-14 + sweep + freeze) was tracked by sibling epic gqlc-33k, now closed with the freeze (PR #81 / ADR 0008). The dependency edge on gqlc-0mx (resolver/codegen) was removed at close: that is post-freeze work this umbrella was never scoped to contain — it proceeds under gqlc-0mx directly. GH #17 superseded by #15's close.

R0 skeleton merged to master via PR #87 (squash a08ec3c): internal/resolver package with pinned ADR 0008 API, QueryResolver interface + compile-time assertion, minimal ValidatedQuery with ResolvedType sealed sum (graph.PropertyType vocabulary), 6-step kernel for labelled single-node MATCH/RETURN, golden-pair harness (5 valid / 7 invalid fixtures), 3 sentinels with bidirectional reachability sweep. Spec merged earlier via PR #86. Linus PASS verified; prescribed nits landed.

R1 merged to master: spec PR #89 (8b3ee2b) + code PR #90 (squash 6296e72). Three-phase kernel (A1 labelled nodes / A2 directed single-hop single-type EdgeKey formation incl. anonymous edges and inline endpoints / B fixed-point unlabelled-binding inference / C deferred edge closure). ResolvedEdge{schema.EdgeKey} joins the sum; sentinels grow to closed 5 (adds ErrUnknownEdge, ErrAmbiguousBinding); 8 new valid + 8 new invalid fixtures, edge_binding.cypher retired to valid. Linus PASS on kernel + prescribed nit round + ratification for fdee623.
